ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the hospital is located */,
  "single_multi" TEXT /* Type of hospital (single-specialty or multi-specialty) */,
  "govt_pvt" TEXT /* Ownership type (government or private) */,
  "directorate" TEXT /* Directorate of the hospital */,
  "edc" INTEGER /* EDC (Electronic Data Capture) number */,
  "edc_date" TEXT /* EDC date */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the hospital */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of hospital services (e.g., CAPD, PHYSIO) */,
  "phc_chc" TEXT /* Classification of the hospital (PHC or CHC) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "website" TEXT /* Hospital's website URL */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the hospital was established */,
  "bed_count" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the hospital */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff members */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone where the hospital is located (e.g., North, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_govt_pvt FOREIGN KEY ("govt_pvt") REFERENCES ownership_types ("ownership_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_directorate FOREIGN KEY ("directorate") REFERENCES directorates ("directorate_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_edc FOREIGN KEY ("edc") REFERENCES edcs ("edc_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_grade FOREIGN KEY ("grade") REFERENCES grades ("grade_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_phc_chc FOREIGN KEY ("phc_chc") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_single_multi FOREIGN KEY ("single_multi") REFERENCES single_multi_types ("single_multi_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directorates" (
  "directorate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directorate */,
  "directorate_name" TEXT /* Name of the directorate */,
  "head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the directorate */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the head */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directorate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for achieving the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., CAPD, PHYSIO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type of service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., PHC, CHC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, administrator, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the hospital data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the hospital data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_types" (
  "ownership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership type */,
  "ownership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ownership type (e.g., government, private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "single_multi_types" (
  "single_multi_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each single/multi type */,
  "single_multi_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the single/multi type (e.g., single-specialty, multi-specialty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the single/multi type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("single_multi_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edcs" (
  "edc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EDC */,
  "edc_number" INTEGER /* EDC number */,
  "edc_date" TEXT /* EDC date */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the EDC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edc_id")
)
column_names: District where the hospital is located
Type of hospital services (e.g., CAPD, PHYSIO)
